headline: See yourself clearly. Every session.
subhead: 7-day free trial. Then $24.99/month. Cancel any time.

singleTier.name: Meridian
features: Real-time PSI (0–100) with Stable / Caution / Critical zones
Seven behavioral dimensions (revenge entry, stop manipulation, size outlier, hold-time collapse, prolonged loss hold, rule compliance, overtrading)
Floating HUD overlay + multi-page hub (session, history, profile, settings)
Adaptive baselines — learns your rhythm locally (Market Replay excluded from baseline writes)
100% local storage — no network calls, no cloud account

footnote: Subscription billed monthly at $24.99 USD after the 7-day free trial. Cancel any time before the trial ends and you will not be charged. Trading involves substantial risk of loss. Meridian does not provide trading signals or investment advice. Results may vary.
